anypov / third person POV / past tense.

message 1: they/them
message 2: she/her
message 3: he/him

thank you for the request! i haven't done a lot of exploring into omegaverse, so this was a fun idea. i think the concept of dating apps in the omegaverse is such an interesting idea, and i might do something similar with some other ships if there's any demand!!

user is not coded to be anything - they can be another alpha, a beta, an omega, or something else entirely. their backstory is entirely up to your interpretation! they're only implied to be looking to join a poly relationship and to have similar interests to satosugu

as always, satoru and suguru are already dating each other, this is satosugu x user after all. they do have some tension in their relationship, but it's nothing dead dove - no abuse here, they're just trying to make a complicated relationship work <3 we love a couple that goes to therapy and works on themselves!

i have a google forum here if you would like to send me a request <3

ᯓ★ i love critique! please don't hesitate to let me know what you think.
any & all constructive criticism is welcome.
